This plant is native to Southeast Asia and is commonly found in tropical regions. The classification of Dupatya dendroides is further refined to the rank of species within the kingdom Plantae. It belongs to the phylum Magnoliophyta and the class Magnoliopsida. The classification of Dupatya dendroides reflects its evolutionary relationships and shared characteristics with other plants in the Celastraceae family.
